name: Oil-Dri Corporation of America
description: Oil-Dri Corporation of America is a leading global manufacturer and supplier of specialty sorbent products for consumer and business-to-business markets. Founded in 1941 and headquartered in Chicago, Illinois, the company leverages extensive mineral reserves, including calcium bentonite and attapulgite, to provide innovative solutions across various sectors, including pet care, animal health, fluids purification, and industrial applications. As a vertically integrated organization, Oil-Dri operates mines and manufacturing facilities internationally, maintaining a strong commitment to research, development, and sustainable practices while delivering value through its diverse portfolio of mineral-based products.
